source_meta.source_document: C-STEM AMT and PINNACLE Acetabular Cup System

systems.system_notes: Hybrid or fully cemented total hip arthroplasty construct combining the C-STEM AMT cemented femoral stem with the PINNACLE acetabular cup system.

trays.tray_notes: Official C-STEM and PINNACLE materials support dedicated femoral and acetabular instrumentation for the combined platform.

components.component_notes: Official materials describe C-STEM AMT as a polished triple-tapered cemented femoral stem with standard and high-offset options.
Official product materials describe PINNACLE as the acetabular shell family paired with C-STEM in hybrid THR.
Official product materials describe the Pinnacle liner family used in the acetabular construct.
Official C-STEM materials state the stem can be used with both metal and ceramic heads.

unresolved_items.raw_text: The public C-STEM and PINNACLE pages confirm the construct and implant families but this pass does not expand the full cemented stem and liner code matrix.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper catalogue or IFU pass is needed for product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
